name: Richard Stockton Service Area (NJ Turnpike)
description: Southbound NJ Turnpike service area at MM 58 between Interchanges 7A and 7 in Hamilton, Mercer County, with Sunoco fuel (gas/diesel), a food court, restrooms and car/truck parking.

name: Woodrow Wilson Service Area (NJ Turnpike)
description: Northbound NJ Turnpike service area at MM 58 between Interchanges 7 and 7A in Hamilton, Mercer County, with Sunoco fuel, food, restrooms and truck parking.

name: Molly Pitcher Service Area (NJ Turnpike)
description: Southbound NJ Turnpike service area at MM 71 between Interchanges 8 and 8A in Cranbury, Middlesex County, offering Sunoco fuel, a food court, restrooms, EV charging and truck parking.

name: Joyce Kilmer Service Area (NJ Turnpike)
description: Northbound NJ Turnpike service area at MM 78 between Interchanges 8A and 9 in East Brunswick, Middlesex County, offering Sunoco fuel, a food court, restrooms, EV charging and truck parking.

name: Petro Bordentown (TravelCenters of America)
description: Full-service Petro/TA travel center near NJ Turnpike Exit 7 (also I-295 Exit 56/57) with Exxon gas/diesel, Iron Skillet and Arby's, showers, laundry, a CAT scale, TA Truck Service repair shop and roughly 390-490 truck parking spaces.

name: CAT Scale at Petro Bordentown
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Petro Bordentown travel center near NJ Turnpike Exit 7 / I-295 Exit 57, providing guaranteed-accurate axle and gross weights.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash - Bordentown
description: Blue Beacon commercial truck and trailer wash at the Petro complex near NJ Turnpike Exit 7 / I-295 Exit 56-57, offering tractor/trailer washing, reefer washouts, engine wash and aluminum brightening.

name: Cranbury Service Center
description: Family-run fleet and heavy-duty truck repair shop serving the Exit 8/8A Cranbury warehouse district since 1968, offering 24/7 heavy-duty towing, 24/7 mobile road service, diesel/engine/brake/transmission repair and tire service.

name: American Truck (mobile road service)
description: 24-hour emergency mobile truck and trailer road service and towing covering the NJ Turnpike Exit 9 / New Brunswick area, providing tires, engine, brake and electrical repairs with a 60-90 minute response time.

name: Service Tire Truck Centers (STTC) - South Plainfield
description: Commercial truck tire dealer and repair center near the northern end of this Turnpike segment (Exit 10 / Edison area), offering truck tires, mounting/repair and 24/7 emergency road service.

name: Molly Pitcher Service Area Truck Parking
description: Dedicated truck parking at the southbound Molly Pitcher service area (MM 71) between Interchanges 8 and 8A in Cranbury.

name: Joyce Kilmer Service Area Truck Parking
description: Dedicated truck parking at the northbound Joyce Kilmer service area (MM 78) between Interchanges 8A and 9 in East Brunswick.

name: Richard Stockton Service Area Truck Parking
description: Dedicated truck parking at the southbound Richard Stockton service area (MM 58) between Interchanges 7A and 7 in Hamilton.

name: Petro Bordentown Truck Parking
description: Large overnight truck parking lot (roughly 390-490 spaces) at the Petro Bordentown travel center near NJ Turnpike Exit 7.

name: Ideal Driving School - Woodbridge
description: CDL truck and bus driver training school in Woodbridge Township near NJ Turnpike Exit 11, offering commercial driver's license instruction.

name: E-Z Wheels Driving School - Hopelawn (Woodbridge)
description: CDL Class A/B truck driver training school in the Hopelawn section of Woodbridge Township near NJ Turnpike Exit 11.
